report.summary: UX polish for Crypto Oracles Guide 2026 and Hyperliquid Ecosystem Guide — converted FAQ to accessible accordion pattern, added ARIA landmarks and list roles across both pages, semantic nav wrappers on related guides, 44px touch targets, and removed Hyperliquid bg override to inherit site-wide dark theme.

sections.title: UX Improvements — Crypto Oracles Guide 2026
items: Oracle data flow diagram: Added role=list, aria-label='Oracle data flow steps', and role=listitem + aria-label on all 4 flow step cards (Data Source, Node Network, On-chain Delivery, Smart Contract)
FAQ section: Converted from static div cards to <details>/<summary> accordion pattern for consistency with site-wide FAQ UX (5 FAQ items now collapsible/expandable)
Related Guides: Wrapped in semantic <nav> with aria-label='Related oracle and DeFi guides'
Related Guides: Added min-h-[44px] touch targets to all 6 CTA link cards
Verified: OG image correctly configured (/api/og?title=Crypto+Oracles+Explained:+Chainlink+vs+Pyth+vs+API3&category=Learn&type=learn) — 1200x630, type=learn

sections.title: UX Improvements — Hyperliquid Ecosystem Guide
items: Removed hardcoded backgroundColor on <main> — page now inherits site-wide dark theme correctly instead of overriding with #0d1117
Why Hyperliquid Dominates section: Added role=list with aria-label and role=listitem + aria-label on all 4 dominance cards
Key Features section: Added role=list with aria-label='Hyperliquid key features' and role=listitem + aria-label on all 5 feature cards
How to Trade section: Converted from div list to semantic <ol> with role=list, aria-label='Steps to trade on Hyperliquid', and <li> elements for all 5 trading steps
Risks section: Added aria-label='Hyperliquid investment risks' to the risks <ul> element
Related Guides: Wrapped in semantic <nav> with aria-label='Related trading and DeFi guides'
Related Guides: Added minHeight:44px touch targets to all 5 CTA link cards
Verified: OG image correctly configured (/api/og?title=Hyperliquid:+The+%231+Perp+DEX+Guide+2026&category=Ecosystem&type=page) — 1200x630, type=page

sections.title: OG Images & Social Metadata
items: Verified: Crypto Oracles Guide OG image uses type=learn (blue gradient + book icon) — correct for learn category
Verified: Hyperliquid Guide OG image uses type=page (standard layout) — correct for ecosystem category
Both pages have Twitter card images configured (summary_large_image)
No OG fixes needed — both pages were scaffolded with correct OG params

sections.title: Audit Findings (No Fix Required)
items: Crypto Oracles: Already uses <article> wrapper, proper Breadcrumb, ArticleStructuredData + FAQStructuredData schemas
Crypto Oracles: Comparison table already has aria-label + scope='col' + overflow-x-auto for mobile
Crypto Oracles: Stats grid already has role=list + role=listitem with ARIA labels
Hyperliquid: Already uses <article> + <main> wrappers, proper Breadcrumb, inline JSON-LD structured data
Hyperliquid: Both fee and competitor tables already have aria-label + scope='col' + overflowX:auto
Hyperliquid: Key stats and performance stats grids already have role=list + role=listitem
Hyperliquid: FAQ already uses <details>/<summary> accordion pattern
Both pages have proper heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3) and financial disclaimer sections

files_changed: src/app/learn/crypto-oracles-guide-2026/page.tsx (ARIA on flow diagram, FAQ to accordion, semantic nav, touch targets)
src/app/ecosystem/hyperliquid/HyperliquidClient.tsx (bg override removed, ARIA list roles on dominates/features/trade sections, risks aria-label, semantic nav, touch targets)
